title: EasyDecraftables
description: Allows for decrafting of iron, gold, and diamond tools and armor for their original resources.
body:
**Allows for decrafting of iron, gold, and diamond tools for their original materials.**

## Examples
### Diamond Example
Here's an example of decrafting something diamond:
![An image of a diamond pickaxe in a crafting table being made into some diamonds.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5aede6d1bf2538ee17698a2db83a3ab4eb37979.png)

### Gold Example
Here's an example of decrafting something gold:
![An image of a gold pickaxe in a crafting table being made into some gold.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a597bf558c8c0dbeab71ab638ef27edca17200cf.png)

### Iron Example
Here's an example of decrafting something iron:
![An image of an iron pickaxe in a crafting table being made into some iron ingots.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9529f0be8db3ca7e7b39954ca14736dfb4ebb2d7.png)
